records_captured: base stat rows for all Pokémon in the mapped Champions pool

fields.name: pokemon_id
fields.description: PokéAPI numeric ID, treated as the canonical pokemon_id

fields.name: pokemon_name
fields.description: Species name as reported by PokéAPI

fields.name: form_name
fields.description: Normalized form label; default form uses the base species name

fields.name: stat_total
fields.description: Sum of the six base stats

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: API endpoint the record was extracted from

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Dataset version this staging snapshot feeds

known_risks: Form-name mismatches between canonical and format-specific sources
Multi-form species that need explicit mapping rather than name-only joins
